title: Change background color to pure black

requirements.summary: Update CSS custom properties to set background color to pure black
acceptanceCriteria: The --background CSS variable is set to 0% 0% 0% in OKLCH format
Both light and dark theme sections reflect the pure black background
The application displays a pure black background across all screens

file_operations.description: Modify the --background CSS custom property in both the :root (light theme) and .dark (dark theme) sections to use 0% 0% 0% in OKLCH format, representing pure black (#000000). Preserve all other CSS variables and the existing OKLCH color format structure.
